---
title: "Papers, February 2026"
bibliography: refs.bib
---

## [Massive Sound Embedding Benchmark (MSEB)](https://openreview.net/forum?id=X0juYgFVng)
- [Poster](https://neurips.cc/virtual/2025/loc/san-diego/poster/121597)
- [Code](https://github.com/google-research/mseb) --- Apache 2.0
- [SVQ dataset](https://huggingface.co/datasets/google/svq)
- [SVQ blog post](https://research.google/blog/speech-to-retrieval-s2r-a-new-approach-to-voice-search/)
- [Google Research](https://research.google/pubs/massive-sound-embedding-benchmark-mseb/)

## [MASSIVE: A 1M-Example Multilingual Natural Language Understanding Dataset with 51 Typologically-Diverse Languages](https://aclanthology.org/2023.acl-long.235/) [@fitzgerald-etal-2023-massive]
- Cited (indirectly) by [@heigold2025massive]
- [code](https://github.com/alexa/massive) --- Apache 2.0

## [alibaba/zvec](https://github.com/alibaba/zvec)
- [Home](https://zvec.org/en/)
- [Docs](https://zvec.org/en/docs/)

## [Crowdsourced high-quality UK and Ireland English Dialect speech data set](https://www.openslr.org/83/) [@demirsahin-etal-2020-open]
- Midlands, Northern, Southern English, Scottish, Welsh, Irish
